message:
test(bd-28wu): cover HTTP types, handler config, error variants, and session cleanup

Add 13 tests for fastmcp-transport http.rs covering HttpMethod as_str
round-trip, HttpStatus boundary cases, request helpers (content_type,
authorization, json), response constructors, handler config defaults
and accessor, all HttpError Display variants, From<CodecError> and
From<TransportError>, HttpTransport rejecting Request messages,
SessionStore cleanup, and CORS-disabled OPTIONS handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
